footer.brand: Digital products that simplify operations and drive business forward.

hero.title: Well-crafted software. For businesses that don't stop.
hero.subtitle: Cerneo builds digital products that solve real problems, with the reliability your operation demands.

manifesto.title: Why Cerneo?
manifesto.paragraph1: Cerneo comes from the fusion of Cerne — the core, the essence — and Neo — the new, the evolution. Technology built from a solid foundation.
manifesto.paragraph2: We exist because good software shouldn't be the exception. Businesses depend on tools that work, that scale, and that don't break when it matters most.
manifesto.paragraph3: Every product we build solves a specific problem, simply and reliably. No unnecessary complexity. No empty promises.

logo.title: The Cerneo Hexagon
logo.subtitle: Our symbol is the hexagon — nature's most efficient shape.
logo.item1Desc: Nature's most resistant geometry. Our solutions follow the same principle: built to last.
logo.item2Desc: Hexagons fit together without gaps. Our products are designed to work together, seamlessly.
logo.item3Desc: Found in crystals, beehives, and molecular engineering. Every detail exists for a reason.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Digital tools that solve real, everyday problems.

kalender.name: Cerneo Kalender
kalender.description: Smart scheduling for businesses. Automate bookings, reduce no-shows, and manage schedules in one place.

differentials.title: Why Choose Cerneo
differentials.subtitle: Concrete results for your business operations.

reliability.title: Stability
reliability.description: Systems designed for high availability. Your operation keeps running, even during peak hours.

scalability.title: Scalability
scalability.description: Infrastructure that keeps up with your company's growth. No forced migrations, no surprises.

agility.title: Continuous Evolution
agility.description: Frequent updates based on real feedback. Our products improve alongside your business needs.

datadriven.title: Data That Makes Sense
datadriven.description: Dashboards and reports that turn numbers into decisions. Clear information for those who need to act fast.

security.title: Real Security
security.description: Data protection compliant with LGPD. Encryption, access control, and continuous monitoring.

support.title: Support That Delivers
support.description: A technical team that understands the product. No canned scripts, no red tape.

culture.title: Our Culture
culture.subtitle: Great products come from great teams. We invest in the people behind the technology.

trust.title: Transparency
trust.subtitle: We operate openly. Learn about our commitments.
trust.privacyDesc: How we handle and protect your data.
trust.termsDesc: Terms and conditions for using our services.

hero.title: About Cerneo
hero.subtitle: A technology company that believes well-built software changes how businesses operate.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Cerneo was born from a simple question: why are so many business tools so hard to use?
story.paragraph2: Founded by software engineers, the company exists to build products that work as they should — reliable, intuitive, and ready for the real world. We bring together solutions that share the same foundation: tested code, user-centered design, and solid infrastructure.
story.paragraph3: Our name combines Cerne (essence) and Neo (new). We build the new from foundations that work.

item1.title: Foundation
item1.description: Cerneo is founded with the mission to build digital products that actually solve problems.

item3.title: Launch
item3.description: Cerneo Kalender goes live with its first customers.

item4.title: Expansion
item4.description: Growth of the Cerneo ecosystem with new features and integrations.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: What guides every decision at Cerneo.

excellence.title: Craftsmanship
excellence.description: Details matter. From code to pixel, every delivery reflects the standard we hold ourselves to.

innovation.title: Pragmatism
innovation.description: Innovation means solving problems better, not chasing technology trends.

transparency.title: Honesty
transparency.description: We say what we think — to clients, partners, and to each other. Transparency isn't a wall poster.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: We measure success by the results we generate for the people who use our products.

cta.title: Want to Join?
cta.subtitle: We're growing and looking for people who share this mindset.

hero.title: People & Culture
hero.subtitle: Great technology is made by great people. It's that simple.

philosophy.title: How We Think
philosophy.paragraph1: Culture isn't a poster on the wall. It's how we make decisions every day.
philosophy.paragraph2: We believe the best solutions come from teams that combine technical skill with genuine respect. That's why we invest as much in people as in products.
philosophy.paragraph3: Our environment is built on three pillars: autonomy to act, trust to experiment, and responsibility to deliver.

values.title: What We Value
values.subtitle: The principles that define how we work.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: Every person owns their work. We decide, execute, and answer for the results.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We get it right from the start. Shortcuts become rework, and rework is expensive.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Nobody builds anything alone. The best ideas emerge when different perspectives meet.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: Stop learning, stop growing. We invest in every person's development on the team.

transparency.title: Candor
transparency.description: We speak clearly, even when it's uncomfortable. Hidden problems become bigger problems.

balance.title: Balance
balance.description: Consistent results require consistent energy. Life outside of work isn't optional.

howWeWork.title: How We Work
howWeWork.subtitle: Practices that sustain the way we operate.

remote.title: Remote-First
remote.description: Remote work by default. Flexibility on schedule and location.

async.title: Async Communication
async.description: Written documentation over meetings. We respect everyone's focus and time.

reviews.title: Code Review
reviews.description: All code goes through review. It's learning, not bureaucracy.

learning.title: Learning Budget
learning.description: Investment in courses, conferences, and certifications for the entire team.

cta.title: Want to Work at Cerneo?
cta.subtitle: We're looking for people who want to build products that make a difference.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Cerneo Tecnologia Ltda. ("Cerneo", "we") values the privacy of our users. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data in compliance with applicable data protection laws.

collection.title: 2. Data Collected
collection.content: We may collect the following personal data:
items: Identification data: name, email, phone, tax ID
Usage data: pages visited, browsing time, IP address
Device data: browser type, operating system, screen resolution
Voluntarily provided data: contact messages, feedback

usage.title: 3. Use of Data
items: Provide and improve our services and products
Communicate updates, news, and relevant information
Ensure the security and integrity of our systems
Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
Statistical analysis and user experience improvement

sharing.title: 4. Data Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. We may share data with: essential service providers (hosting, analytics), legal authorities when required by law, and Cerneo group companies for operational purposes.

storage.title: 5. Storage and Security
storage.content: Your data is stored on secure servers with encryption in transit and at rest. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
items: Confirm the existence of data processing
Access your personal data
Correct incomplete or outdated data
Request anonymization, blocking, or deletion of data
Request data portability
Revoke consent at any time

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.content: To exercise your rights or clarify questions about this policy, contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at: privacy@cerneo.com.br

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Cerneo Tecnologia Ltda. ("Cerneo") services, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, do not use our services.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.content: Cerneo is a technology holding that offers software products, including Cerneo Kalender. Each product may have additional specific terms.

responsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content: By using our services, you agree to:
items: Provide truthful and up-to-date information
Maintain the confidentiality of your access credentials
Not use the services for illegal or unauthorized purposes
Not attempt to access restricted areas of our systems
Respect Cerneo's and third parties' intellectual property

ip.title: 4. Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content, source code, design, trademarks, logos, and materials available in Cerneo's services are the exclusive property of Cerneo or its licensors. No intellectual property rights are transferred to the user by using the services.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Cerneo strives to keep its services available and functional but does not guarantee uninterrupted availability. We are not responsible for: indirect damages, lost profits, data loss caused by factors beyond our control, or temporary service unavailability.

modifications.title: 6. Modifications
modifications.content: Cerneo reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Significant changes will be communicated by email or through notice in our services. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

governing.title: 7. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. Any dispute shall be submitted to the courts of São Paulo, SP, to the exclusion of any other.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these Terms of Use, contact us at: legal@cerneo.com.br
